sections.paragraph:
Original: סוּך

Transliteration: sûk

Phonetic: sook

BDB Definition:

  1. to anoint, pour in anointing
    1. (Qal) to anoint
      1. to anoint oneself
      2. to anoint (another)
      3. to be poured
    2. (Hiphil) to anoint

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1474

Part(s) of speech: Verb
